subcodes.first_line: O thou who art intoxicated with the wine of the Day of the Covenant! If thou hast made a covenant and pledge, take in hand the chalice of the love of God and the wine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مخمور باده یوم عهد اگر بسته عهد و پیمانی پیمانه محبت الله بدست گیر و صهبای
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @martyrs and martyrdom, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement
